name: Whiskey Smash

spec.method_detail: Muddle lemon wedges and mint with syrup. Add bourbon and lemon juice. Shake with ice. Fine strain over crushed ice in rocks glass.

history: The Smash is one of the original cocktail categories from Jerry Thomas's 1862 manual — essentially a small Julep made with any spirit and seasonal fruit. Dale DeGroff revived the Whiskey Smash specifically in the 1990s at the Rainbow Room, setting the modern standard. It's a simpler, more casual sibling to the Mint Julep.
